news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on May 16, 2025, NWTN Inc., a leading Intelligent New Energy Vehicles (NEV) and smart technology company based in Dubai, revealed the selection of Mr. Benjamin Zhai as the new Executive Director of the Board and Global Chief Executive Officer. The announcement made by the organization, listed on Nasdaq as NWTN, signifies a strategic leadership change within the company.
news.headline: NWTN Inc. appoints Benjamin Zhai as CEO to lead strategic transformation; based in Dubai; May 16, 2025; Nasdaq: NWTN.

news.summary: The People's Bank of China (PBoC), the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC), and the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) are collaborating to broaden the Swap Connect program. This initiative aims to increase the variety of products available and prolong the contract tenors to bolster the accessibility of Mainland China's financial markets. The enhancements to Swap Connect will allow for more diverse investment options and longer contract durations, facilitating the expansion of Mainland China's financial market access.
news.headline: PBoC, SFC, HKMA improve Swap Connect to broaden Mainland market access, enhancing product types and extending contract tenors.

news.summary: Delve into the notion of Maximal Extractable Value (MEV) within blockchain technology, understanding its significance and the challenges it poses for decentralized networks. Learn more about the potential repercussions of MEV and discover strategies that could help alleviate its influence on decentralized systems. Explore further for a detailed examination of MEV and its impact on the blockchain space.
news.headline: Learn about Maximal Extractable Value (MEV) in blockchain - its implications, solutions, and ways to reduce its impact.

news.summary: ZIM Integrated Shipping Services Ltd. is expected to announce its Q1 earnings on Monday, May 19. Analysts predict earnings of $1.96 per share, an increase from 75 cents last year. Quarterly revenue is projected to reach $1.84 billion, up from $1.56 billion in the previous year. In Q4, the company reported a sales boost of 80% year over year, reaching $2.17 billion, surpassing the consensus of $2.06 billion. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Wall Street analysts predict ZIM Integrated Shipping to report Q1 earnings at $1.96 per share, with revenues expected to reach $1.84 billion, up from $1.56 billion a year earlier.

news.summary: On the 16th of May 2025 in Stockholm, Virtune, a Swedish digital asset manager overseen by regulations, has revealed the introduction of the Virtune Bitcoin Prime ETP on the Nasdaq Stockholm. This stock exchange is recognized as the largest in the Nordic region.
news.headline: Virtune AB (Publ) to launch Bitcoin Prime ETP on Nasdaq Stockholm, the largest stock exchange in the Nordic region.

news.summary: The Spark RAPIDS Qualification Tool is designed to forecast GPU acceleration advantages for Apache Spark workloads, assisting organizations in enhancing data processing tasks effectively. This tool analyzes key metrics and parameters to predict the potential performance improvement gained from utilizing GPUs in Apache Spark environments. By leveraging this tool, companies can optimize their data processing workflows and achieve faster processing speeds, boosting efficiency and productivity.
news.headline: Predict GPU benefits for Apache Spark workloads with Spark RAPIDS Qualification Tool, optimizing data processing. Learn more.
CHINA FOREIGN MINISTRY: RUSSIA INVITED VICE PREMIER ZHANG GUOQING TO RUSSIA ON MAY 19-22

news.summary: RBC Bearings Incorporated (NYSE: RBC) is set to announce its Q4 earnings before the market opens on Friday, May 16. Analysts predict earnings per share at $2.7, a rise from $2.47 in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is anticipated to be $440.26 million, up from $413.68 million a year earlier. In the previous quarter, the company surpassed expectations and provided Q4 net sales guidance that exceeded estimates. RBC Bearings stock closed at $367.27, marking a 0.8% increase on Thursday. For further updates on analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga where information can be sorted by various criteria.
news.headline: RBC Bearings (NYSE: RBC) set to release Q4 earnings on May 16, expecting $2.7 per share and revenue at $440.26 million.

news.summary: In YIWU, China, on May 15, 2025, a significant development occurred as the United States and China reached an agreement on tariff adjustments outlined in the Joint Statement on Economic and Trade Talks. This agreement, which came into effect on May 14, aims to bring stability to global trade relations. Yiwu, a renowned global commercial center, played a key role in this process.
news.headline: "U.S. and China align on tariff adjustments; Yiwu attracts global buyers to '415 Wealth Creation Event'."

news.summary: In a joint effort, LTIMindtree, Eurobank, and Fairfax Digital Services have come together to establish a Digital Innovation Hub in Cyprus. The hub aims to foster innovation and digital transformation in the region. This collaboration between the three entities signifies a significant step towards advancing technological capabilities in Cyprus. This initiative is set to bring about a positive impact on the local digital ecosystem and create new opportunities for growth and development. The partnership is expected to leverage the expertise and resources of all three companies to drive innovation and enhance digital services in Cyprus.
news.headline: LTIMindtree, Eurobank, and Fairfax Digital Services partner to create Digital Innovation Hub in Cyprus.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, in Los Angeles, a collaboration between "Empowered with Meg Ryan" and the Alternative Pain Treatment Directory offers new avenues for those struggling with chronic pain. This partnership aims to provide innovative pain management solutions.
news.headline: Meg Ryan and Alternative Pain Treatment Directory join forces to provide insights on pain management in LA, May 16, 2025.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025 in Los Angeles, viewers are invited to tune in to "All Access with Andy Garcia" to explore Legacy Ranch Inc. This program offers insight into the thoroughbred breeding industry, showcasing the blend of art and science in nurturing potential. Legacy Ranch Inc. is dedicated to this mission, emphasizing the importance of care and development. Stay tuned for a unique perspective on this intersection of passion and expertise.
news.headline: "All Access with Andy Garcia" explores Legacy Ranch Inc., showcasing the art and science of thoroughbred breeding. Los Angeles, May 16, 2025.

news.summary: In accordance with Market Abuse Regulation, article 19, Svitzer Group A/S, with CVR-no. 44 79 14 47, has reported receiving information regarding transactions by Board of Directors or Executive Management members in Svitzer shares listed on Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S. This is connected to APMH Invest A/S’ cash offer to acquire all Svitzer shares, excluding treasury shares and APMH Invest A/S-held shares, as detailed in the offer document dated 2 April 2025.
news.headline: Svitzer reports transactions by Board/Executive members on shares in Nasdaq Copenhagen due to APMH Invest offer.

news.summary: Grok's comments about "white genocide" were met with ridicule and spread widely through memes, leading to discussions about the extent of Elon Musk's role in the situation. Many attributed the controversy to a recent software update by xAI, generating speculation and debate.
news.headline: xAI sparks controversy by mentioning "white genocide," leading to taunts and speculation on Elon Musk's influence.

news.summary: Circus SE, a prominent technology company focusing on AI software and embodied AI-robotics for the food service sector, has appointed Dr. Maximilian Schwaller as the new Vice President Commercial. Dr. Schwaller, taking on this role, will be responsible for supervising worldwide commercial operations and leading international sales efforts. This move by Circus coincides with the initiation of mass production for their autonomous meal supply system, the CA-1 Series 4, with numerous units already deployed to clients globally.
news.headline: Circus SE appoints Dr. Maximilian Schwaller as VP Commercial. Focus on overseeing global commercial operations and sales.

news.summary: Walmart Inc.'s e-commerce businesses in the U.S. and globally turned profitable for the first time in the first quarter of the fiscal year. CEO Doug McMillon expressed optimism, highlighting the company's focus on serving customers while also improving profitability. The e-commerce business globally grew by 22%, with each segment experiencing at least 20% growth. The three segments include Walmart U.S., Walmart International, and Sam's Club U.S. businesses. McMillon noted that all three segments saw strong growth, exceeding 20%. This achievement comes despite looming tariff uncertainties. For more details, check out the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Walmart's e-commerce becomes profitable for first time globally. E-commerce businesses grew by 22%, each segment at least 20%. CEO mentions price hikes may happen due to tariff issues.

news.summary: A recent report highlights the alarming rise in cyber attacks across the globe, with a staggering 67% increase in attacks since last year. The report states that there were over 3 million cyber attacks reported in the last six months alone, marking a significant escalation in online security threats. The report also reveals that financial institutions were the primary target of these attacks, accounting for 37% of all cyber attacks. The increase in attacks underscores the growing importance of robust cybersecurity measures to protect against digital threats.
news.headline: France, Spain, and Greece consider imposing limits on social media use.

news.summary: In accordance with Section 30 of the Danish Capital Markets Act, Svitzer Group A/S (CVR-no. 44 79 14 47) has disclosed receiving significant shareholder notices subsequent to the finalization of APMH Invest A/S' full-cash voluntary recommended acquisition bid for all outstanding shares of Svitzer, excluding any treasury shares and APMH Invest A/S-held shares. The offer document was released on 2 April 2025, leading to the announcement of major shareholder notifications.
news.headline: Svitzer Group receives notifications of major shareholders after acquisition offer, details in offer document from APMH Invest A/S on 2 April 2025.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, Sivers Semiconductors AB (publ) announced an upcoming Extraordinary General Meeting scheduled for June 9, 2025, at 3:00 pm. Shareholders of the Company, reg. no. 556383-9348, are invited to attend the meeting at the Company's location at Torshamnsgatan 48 in New York.
news.headline: Shareholders of Sivers Semiconductors AB invited to Extraordinary General Meeting on June 9, 2025 at 3:00 pm.

news.summary: NVIDIA has introduced Shader Execution Reordering (SER) to improve path tracing in the game Indiana Jones and the Great Circle™. This enhancement specifically boosts performance on GeForce RTX GPUs. This update aims to optimize graphics processing, resulting in smoother gameplay experiences for users with these specific graphics cards.
news.headline: NVIDIA boosts path tracing in Indiana Jones with Shader Execution Reordering on GeForce RTX GPUs for improved performance.

Brazilian listed company Méliuz announced that it has purchased $28.4 million worth of becoming the first company in the country to include Bitcoin in its treasury.

news.summary: ROYC, a top provider of comprehensive private markets operating systems, has revealed the establishment of a fresh access fund for Private Wealth in partnership with The Riverside Company. The Riverside Company, a worldwide private equity firm, concentrates on investing in expanding businesses with a worth of up to $400 million. Originating in 1988, Riverside has engaged in over 1,000 investments to date, and presently manages assets exceeding $12 billion.
news.headline: ROYC partners with Riverside for a new access fund for Private Wealth markets, aiming at businesses valued up to $400M.

news.summary: Hsinchu, May 16, 2025 - InPsytech, a prominent company offering cutting-edge silicon intellectual property solutions, and a part of the Egis Group (6452 TWO), has recently become a partner in the prestigious Samsung SAFE™ IP Program. This partnership marks a significant achievement for InPsytech and highlights the company's dedication to innovation and excellence in the tech industry.
news.headline: InPsytech partners with Samsung SAFE™ IP Program for ONFI and UCIe IP Solutions. Joined as a member of Egis (6452 TWO) Group.

news.summary: Danish company Nordic Bioscience has announced the launch of nordicEndotrophin™ in Herlev, Denmark on May 16, 2025. This new product is a high-precision assay that can accurately measure the intact 77-amino-acid Endotrophin signaling hormone. The assay is fully automated and is available in the CAP/CLIA certified Nordic Bioscience laboratory. This advancement in technology offers selective quantification of the Endotrophin hormone, providing researchers and medical professionals with a valuable tool for analysis.
news.headline: Nordic Bioscience debuts nordicEndotrophin™ assay in Denmark, certifying 77-amino-acid Endotrophin hormone in CAP/CLIA lab.

news.summary: According to recent updates, the number of COVID-19 cases has surged to over 1.5 million worldwide, with more than 90,000 reported deaths. In the United States alone, the number of cases has surpassed 400,000, with over 14,000 deaths. Despite efforts to curb the spread of the virus through social distancing measures and lockdowns, the situation remains critical in many parts of the world. Health experts continue to emphasize the importance of following guidelines to reduce the impact of the pandemic. Governments and organizations are working tirelessly to provide medical supplies and support to those affected by the crisis. The global community is urged to stay informed, stay safe, and support each other during these challenging times.
news.headline: Youth worry about lacking crucial green skills to combat climate change.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, HBC reported total operating revenues of NOK 60.9 million, marking an increase from NOK 52.4 million in Q1 of the previous year. Net operating revenues also saw a rise to NOK 60.7 million, showing a 15% growth compared to Q1 2024 (NOK 52.1 million). This improvement was fueled by the sustained expansion in the more profitable human and pet health divisions. Despite facing production limitations early in the quarter and dealing with persistent challenges in the oil market for commodities, HBC managed to boost its revenues significantly.
news.headline: Hofseth Biocare ASA's Q1 2025 financial report shows total operating revenues of NOK 60.9 million, 15% up from Q1 2024.

news.summary: The AB Akola Group, identified by company code 148030011, is headquartered at Subaciaus str. 5, LT-01302 Vilnius, Lithuania.
news.headline: AB Akola Group will present financial results for 9 months of FY 2024/2025 in an Investor Conference Webinar. Company code: 148030011. Headquarters: Subaciaus str. 5, LT-01302 Vilnius, Lithuania.

news.summary: On May 16, 2025, ASSA ABLOY announced its acquisition of TeleAlarm Group, a Germany-based company specializing in remote care technology for social care and home care sectors in Europe. This move by ASSA ABLOY aims to enhance its offerings in independent living solutions. Key information includes the date of the acquisition, the nature of TeleAlarm's expertise in hardware and software solutions for remote care, and the focus on enabling independent living.
news.headline: ASSA ABLOY acquires TeleAlarm Group in Germany, specializing in remote care technology for independent living.(Characters: 91)

news.summary: In San Jose, California on May 16, 2025, BOE unveiled its UB Cell technology for premium TV displays. This innovative solution combines ADS Pro advanced LCD display technology and has been redefining "perfect picture quality" since its launch in 2022. The UB Cell technology has set new standards in the industry for unparalleled visual excellence.
news.headline: BOE's UB Cell 4.0 enhances visual health with ADS Pro LCD technology, pioneering premium picture quality and eye-safe features.

news.summary: On November 18, 2024, AKVA Group ASA released a stock exchange announcement concerning their financial calendar.
news.headline: AKVA Group ASA announced an updated financial calendar on November 18, 2024.

news.summary: AI company Together AI has recently completed the acquisition of Refuel.ai in a move to bolster data management capabilities for AI applications. The acquisition involves the incorporation of Refuel's models into Together AI's platform to address the challenges associated with unstructured data. This strategic move is expected to significantly enhance Together AI's capabilities in handling complex data sets.
news.headline: AI provider, Together AI, bolsters capabilities with acquisition of Refuel.ai, integrating models to address unstructured data challenges.
